name: bundled-mcp
description: Vendored MCP preset servers shipped via electron-builder extraResources (→ resources/node_modules). Packaged builds cannot rely on the user having Node/npx installed: electron/mcp/transport.ts#resolvePackagedNpxStdio rewrites `npx <pkg>` to Electron-as-Node + the package entry under resources/node_modules. Keep this dependency list in sync with MCP_PRESETS in electron/mcp/presets.ts. Versions are pinned (no caret/tilde) so packaged installers are byte-reproducible across machines.
